text.title: Golden Set Curation and Maintenance Examples
text.summary: Worked example: input → output trace, end-to-end.

example.step: Trigger: feature `invoice-extraction` shipped to production 30 days ago. 4 hallucination incidents reported.
Inputs: production log sample (PII-safe), incident postmortems, golden/ directory in repo.
Seeding: 50 items stratified — happy_path 13, edge_case 13, adversarial 12, known_failure_class (4 from incidents) 12.
Each item carries `anti_output` plausible-wrong variants (vendor name variant, tax-id prefix variant).
Coverage report attached: min_per_bucket=12, exceeds 15% floor.
PR review: reviewer alex@team.io approves. dataset_version bumped 1.0.0 → 1.1.0.
Outcome: eval pipeline anchors on v1.1.0; first regression catches a vendor-name variant the model started producing two weeks later.
